requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240V/50Hz Type-G Plug (KS IEC 62368-1 / PVOC)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——240V/50Hz G型插头（KS IEC 62368-1 / PVOC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——240V/50Hz G型插頭（KS IEC 62368-1 / PVOC）

summary.en: Kenya operates on 240V/50Hz with type-G plugs (British 3-pin square, BS 1363 equivalent). Wireless and IoT devices with power adapters or direct mains connections must comply with the Kenya Standard KS IEC 62368-1 for audio/video, information and communications technology equipment safety. Electrical safety compliance is also verified through the PVOC (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity) process conducted at the Chinese factory before shipment. Products must be adapted for the 240V/50Hz type-G environment; 220V or type-A/C plug configurations used in China are not suitable without modification.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚采用240V/50Hz电制，插头类型为G型（英式三孔方脚，相当于BS 1363）。带电源适配器或直接接市电的无线及物联网设备须符合肯尼亚标准KS IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备安全）。电气安全合规性也通过在中国工厂出货前进行的PVOC（出口前合规验证）程序加以核验。产品须适配240V/50Hz G型插头环境；中国使用的220V或A/C型插头配置不经改装不适用。
summary.zht: 肯尼亞採用240V/50Hz電制，插頭類型為G型（英式三孔方腳，相當於BS 1363）。帶電源適配器或直接接市電的無線及物聯網裝置須符合肯尼亞標準KS IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊和通訊技術設備安全）。電氣安全合規性也通過在中國工廠出貨前進行的PVOC（出口前合規驗證）程序加以核驗。產品須適配240V/50Hz G型插頭環境；中國使用的220V或A/C型插頭配置不經改裝不適用。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 62368-1 — Audio/Video, Information and Communications Technology Equipment Safety (Kenya Standard)
Kenya PVOC (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity) Programme
BS 1363 — Type-G Plug and Socket (applicable reference for plug compatibility)

summary.en: China uses 220V/50Hz with type-A and type-I plugs. Electrical safety is covered by GB 4943.1 (information technology equipment safety, adopting IEC 62368-1) under the CCC mandatory certification scheme. CCC test reports from CNCA-accredited laboratories are China-domestic only and are not recognised by KEBS or accepted as a substitute for PVOC verification.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz电制，使用A型和I型插头。电气安全由强制性认证（CCC）体系下的GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，采用IEC 62368-1）覆盖。来自CNCA认可实验室的CCC测试报告仅限于中国境内使用，不被KEBS承认，也不能替代PVOC核验。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz電制，使用A型和I型插頭。電氣安全由強制性認證（CCC）體系下的GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，採用IEC 62368-1）覆蓋。來自CNCA認可實驗室的CCC測試報告僅限於中國境內使用，不被KEBS承認，也不能替代PVOC核驗。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information Technology Equipment Safety (China, adopting IEC 62368-1)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — Electrical and Electronic Equipment

gap.en: Kenya's 240V/50Hz type-G environment requires hardware adaptation (plug type and voltage range) and separate KS IEC 62368-1 safety compliance. CCC certification is not recognised. PVOC verification at the Chinese factory by an accredited inspection body (Bureau Veritas, SGS, or Intertek) is required before shipment for regulated product categories.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚240V/50Hz G型插头环境要求硬件适配（插头类型和电压范围）以及独立的KS IEC 62368-1安全合规。CCC认证不被承认。对于受监管产品类别，须在出货前由获认可检验机构（必维、SGS或天祥）在中国工厂完成PVOC核验。
gap.zht: 肯尼亞240V/50Hz G型插頭環境要求硬件適配（插頭類型和電壓範圍）以及獨立的KS IEC 62368-1安全合規。CCC認證不被承認。對於受監管產品類別，須在出貨前由獲認可檢驗機構（必維、SGS或天祥）在中國工廠完成PVOC核驗。

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — PVOC Programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance under KS IEC 62368-1 and PVOC pre-export verification are required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices exported from China to Kenya. Products must be adapted for Kenya's 240V/50Hz type-G plug environment. Chinese CCC certification is not accepted as an equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口到肯尼亚的市电供电无线及物联网设备须符合KS IEC 62368-1电气安全要求，并须完成PVOC出口前核验。产品须适配肯尼亚240V/50Hz G型插头环境。中国CCC认证不被视为等同认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口到肯尼亞的市電供電無線及物聯網裝置須符合KS IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求，並須完成PVOC出口前核驗。產品須適配肯尼亞240V/50Hz G型插頭環境。中國CCC認證不被視為等同認可。
